verses.text: Topa ka phat tawntung ding a, amah phatna ka gengen ding hi
Topa ka phat ding hi. Gimna thuakte zasak un la, lungdam uh hen
Kei tawh Topa nak phat un, ama min pahtawi khawm ni
Keimah in Topa ka zong a, amah in kei hong dawngin, ka launa khempeuh panin kei hong honkhia hi
Amah en un la, maitaii un; tua hi leh na mai uh zum ngeilo ding hi
Hih mi hehpihhuaipa kiko-in, Topa in amah za a, ama haksatna khempeuh panin amah a honkhia hi
Amah a zahtakte' kiimah Topa' vantung mi in giahphual sat a, amaute a honkhia hi
Topa tawh kikhawl phot un la, ama hoihna thei un! Amah a beel mite mi lungdam ahi uh hi
Ama mi siangthote aw, Topa zahtak un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah a zahtak mite in kitangsapna neilo hi
Humpinelkai khanglaite in kisapna leh gilkialna thuak a, ahih hangin Topa a zongte in na hoih a kisap uh omlo hi
Tate aw, hong pai un la hong ngai un; Topa zahtakna thu ka hong hilh ding hi
Nopna a neih theihna dingin nuntakna leh khan'sau a deih kua ahi hiam
Siatna ding panin na leii kem in la, zuau genna panin na muk kem in
Siatna panin kihemkhia in la, a hoih bawl in. Kilemna ding hanciam in la, na phak mateng delh in
Topa' mit in thuman mite' lam en a, amau' kikona lamah a bil a ngat hi
Siatna a bawl mite hih leitung panin a kiphawkna a kisuktatna dingin Topa in amaute a langpang hi
Huhna a ngen dingin thumante a kiko ciangin Topa in za a, a haksatna khempeuh panun amaute a honkhia hi
Lungsim kitamzante kiangah Topa hong om a, lungsim zangawpte a hon hi
Thuman mi' thuakna a tam mahmah hangin tuate khempeuh panin Topa in amah a hon hi
Amah in thuman mipa kem a, a guh khat zong kitanlo hi
Siatna in migilote that ding a, thuman a mudah mite gim kipia ding hi
Topa in ama nasemte honkhia a, amah a bel mi khat beek gim kipialo ding hi.
